form.title: Hero Style 1
form.sampledata: {":type":"ja_rent:hero","hero":{"jatools-layout-hero":"style-1","hero[heading]":["Fast booking, delivery and 24/7 support"],"hero[subheading]":["Professional car rental services for personal or business needs. We choose comfort, safety and a stress-free driving experience."],"hero[bg-image]":["images/backgrounds/hero.jpg"],"hero[choose-car-url]":["cars"],"hero[choose-car-label]":["Choose a car"],"hero[call-btn-label]":["Sună acum"],"hero[people-count]":["1000+ people"],"hero[promo-text]":["chose to rent cars from Rent AutoPark"],"hero[cars-available-label]":["Cars available"],"hero[price-note]":["More days, lower price"],"hero[phone-link]":["tel:+37368123456"],"hero[whatsapp-link]":["https://wa.me/37368123456"],"hero[telegram-link]":["https://t.me/rentautopark"],"hero[viber-link]":["viber://chat?number=%2B37368123456"],"hero[client-photo]":{"hero[client-photo][photo]":["images/clients/1.png","images/clients/2.png","images/clients/3.png","images/clients/4.png","images/clients/5.png"],"rows":1,"cols":5,"type":"list"}}}

field.name: subheading
field.default: Professional car rental services for personal or business needs. We choose comfort, safety and a stress-free driving experience.
field.label: HERO_SUBHEADING_LABEL

field.name: promo-text
field.default: chose to rent cars from Rent AutoPark
field.label: HERO_PROMO_TEXT_LABEL
